checklist.detail: Diff adds chunkText in chunk-text.ts with all specified semantics (empty→[], sentence-boundary splitting via .?! regex, hard-split for over-long sentences, maxLength≤0 throws) and a comprehensive test file covering every acceptance criterion listed in the plan.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan

checklist.detail: Only the two files called for by the plan were changed: chunk-text.ts (the utility) and chunk-text.test.ts (its tests). Zero unrelated churn or refactoring.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: Implementation uses genuine regex-based segmentation and greedy packing logic; tests exercise edge cases (empty, whitespace, at-limit, hard-split, invariants) with real assertions — no test deletion, weakening, or hard-coded expected values observed.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: Pure text-processing utility with no side effects, no I/O, and clear error for invalid maxLength. Regex preserves all characters and the greedy-packing loop maintains content order. No security or regression risk evident; minor edge-case risk with unusual whitespace patterns is acceptable given the plan's limited .?! scope.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar
checklist.label: Judge confidence

dimensions.evidence: Diff adds chunkText in chunk-text.ts with all specified semantics (empty→[], sentence-boundary splitting via .?! regex, hard-split for over-long sentences, maxLength≤0 throws) and a comprehensive test file covering every acceptance criterion listed in the plan.
Only the two files called for by the plan were changed: chunk-text.ts (the utility) and chunk-text.test.ts (its tests). Zero unrelated churn or refactoring.

Implementation uses genuine regex-based segmentation and greedy packing logic; tests exercise edge cases (empty, whitespace, at-limit, hard-split, invariants) with real assertions — no test deletion, weakening, or hard-coded expected values observed.

Pure text-processing utility with no side effects, no I/O, and clear error for invalid maxLength. Regex preserves all characters and the greedy-packing loop maintains content order. No security or regression risk evident; minor edge-case risk with unusual whitespace patterns is acceptable given the plan's limited .?! scope.
